name: MenuRadioItem
visual_summary: MenuRadioItem is a menu radio item UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable navbar behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: MenuRadioItem
Description: MenuRadioItem is a menu radio item UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable navbar behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: themeable, utility-styled
Interactions: interactive
Tags: item, mantine, menu, navbar, radio

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
